text:
Reina (レイナ, Reina) was a five-year-old girl who lived with her mother and older brother Kurt in NGL. 

Appearance

Reina was a little girl with maroon hair that was tied with a yellow bow. She was seen wearing a red vest over a long-sleeved shirt.

Personality

Reina was very happy living with her mother and brother. She was very proud to have a protective brother like Kurt and wanted to marry him when they got older. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

Through a series of journal entries Kurt wrote, we learn various accomplishments made by Reina and her older brother Kurt. Reina is dependent on her brother and hopes to marry him one day, which greatly embarrasses Kurt. Still, he worries about his younger sister's wellbeing and vows to protect her from harm until she finds a worthy man. One day when Kurt and Reina go fishing by the riverside, they catch and cook some fish for their mother to surprise her. As they try to go home, they're confronted by a giant crab-like Chimera Ant. 

The journal monologue ends as the crab draws closer to the two kids. While Kurt tries to defend himself and his sister with his fishing rod, the Chimera Ant easily kills the children and delivers their remains to the Chimera Ant Queen; making them the first humans the Queen devours. Both Reina and Kurt are later reborn as Shidore Hunter × Hunter - Volume 25, Chapter 261 and Colt; Hunter × Hunter - Volume 19, Chapter 188 the desire to protect Reina was so strong that it was passed onto Colt and it has a great influence on his mentality. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 19, Chapter 189 Reina and her big brother Kurt briefly appear again in a flashback with their mother Haruna. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 21, Chapter 215 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

In Spanish, "reina" means "queen".
In some emotional moments, Colt unconsciously changes "Queen" for "Reina".
"Reina" is what Colt names Kite when he is reborn as a Chimera Ant girl.
